name: KYC AML Transaction Approval v1
description: Awareness-level summaries of customer due-diligence, screening, transaction monitoring, and high-risk transaction approval concepts for engineers building banking middleware. Each item describes common control patterns at a conceptual level to inform software design and validation. Nothing here is legal, regulatory, or compliance advice, and screening or monitoring detection is never a legal determination.
license: Original professional summaries authored for LocalAIFactory. No third-party text reproduced verbatim.
legalLimitations: These are practical, awareness-level summaries only and are NOT legal, regulatory, financial, or investment advice, nor a compliance claim. They describe common control patterns conceptually. KYC/AML obligations are highly jurisdiction-specific; a screening hit or monitoring alert is a signal to review, not a legal determination of wrongdoing. All rules must be confirmed against current applicable laws, regulator guidance, scheme rules, and the institution's own approved compliance procedures before use.
sourcePolicy: Original summaries only. No proprietary/official text copied verbatim. Every item carries a limitation note and confidence.
